_schemaDescription: Risk Assessment – Entity Level sample payload. Entity: Global Solutions Inc. 8 layers total, all 8 scored. Categories: Medium Risk/Quarterly (8 layers). 0 layers unscored. Control weakness derived from inherent × residual risk category per layer. Category labels and audit frequency mappings are client-configured (not hardcoded).

_controlWeaknessRef.Weak controls: Inherent High + Residual High — controls not reducing risk
_controlWeaknessRef.Strong controls: Inherent High + Residual Low — controls working well
_controlWeaknessRef.Low-risk area: Inherent Low + Residual Low — inherently low risk, well managed
_controlWeaknessRef.Control failure / anomaly: Inherent Low + Residual High — unexpected high residual despite low inherent risk

riskDistribution.description: 8 scored layers: 8 Medium Risk (Quarterly). 0 layers unscored.

priorityLayers.description: Top 3 layers by residual score requiring immediate audit attention within Global Solutions Inc.
